title: Browser
body:
# Important:
This isn't a standalone plugin. Its an extension for [Boiler](https://modrinth.com/plugin/boiler)

## Usage
starting the browser

```
/boiler display source <id> browser <url>
```


controling the browser
you can click by hitting the screen and scroll by scrolling through your hotbar.
It's also possible to control the click with a command:

```
/boiler display action <id> click <x> <y> <rightClick>
```


You can enter text like this:

```
/boiler display action <id> input <text>
```


and you can enter key(combinations) like this:

```
/boiler display action <id> key <key>
```


If you just want to enter the letter A for example, you can enter "A" as your key.
If you want to click ctrl+A you can simply enter "Control+A"
All key values are listed [here](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/UI_Events/Keyboard_event_key_values)

If you wan't to switch to another page just click the bar at the top with the url. The color of the bar should change from white to gray and you can enter a new url using `/boiler display action <id> input <text>`
